details: 2024/25 electric-assist fleet. TEAL frame with white 'CapMetro' wordmark. Purple-to-blue starfield skirt-guards over both wheels (accent). White/cream rims, black saddle, mid-drive motor. No cargo basket. (Corrects earlier silver guess.)
CURRENT electric fleet: white/light-grey frame with bright GREEN fork, wheel rims and chainguard. 'oo' logo in green. Grey saddle. No front basket. (Older all-blue Bergen bike is retired.)
Azure frame, 'BLUEbikes' white wordmark. Black wire front basket with blue diamond-pattern panel. Blue 'MASSACHUSETTS' + blue-cross skirt-guard with orange accents. White/cream rims.
Ocean/royal-blue frame with lime-green 'CHATTANOOGA' wordmark and bright lime rear skirt-guard. Black wire front basket, black saddle, silver crank.
'Chicago blue' (light cyan) frame + fenders. 'DIVVY' black wordmark with black/white chevrons. Front rack/tray with bungee (not a full basket). (Retained from batch 1; not in provided list.)

Gloss-black frame. 'CoGo' logo ('Co' white, 'Go' red #e23b34), 'COLUMBUS' white downtube. THIS unit has a minimal tubular front rack (no wire basket). Teal-green 'Medical Mutual' rear skirt. Silver rims.

2022 fleet (official render). Black frame. Black HSBC cargo box/bag up front (front carrier). Silver-grey rear skirt-guard with HSBC red hexagon; Ecobici green logo (#7ab800) + Metrobus 'm'. White/cream rims, yellow spoke reflectors.
White frame with bright GREEN wheel rims and green circle logo ('Ddareungi'). Silver wire front basket, black saddle.
White frame with yellow-orange rear skirt-guard and orange chainguard disc. Green 'YouBike' logo. Black wire front basket, white/cream rims.
